name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
🕊️DEAD DOVE DO NO EAT🕊️ Spooktober/Kinktober pt. 1

"...momma..."

FEMPOV | Mommy issues!Ghost x Maternal!User | Established Relationship

TW: Mommy issues (duh), rape, physical assault, suicidal thoughts, alcoholism, drug abuse, self-harm, depression, mentions of abusive relationships, and domestic violence. Don't think these warnings are mild. The descriptions might be too much for some people. So proceed with caution.

Image credit goes to sleepyconfusedpotato on Tumblr!

Mom, I’m tired / Can I sleep in your house tonight? / Mom, is it alright? / If I stay here for a year or two / Mom, I’ll be quiet / It would be just to sleep at night

.

.

.

Mom, am I still young? / Can I dream for a few months more?

- Class of 2013, by Mitski

Semi-prequel of this bot.

In honor of my most popular bot, I decided to make a Ghost version of it too, since I thought his backstory matched the troupe. FYI, I haven't read the comic since I don't know where to read it and what to search to find the comic, so my information about his backstory might be a bit funky.

I desperately wanted to make this Any POV because I wanna make my bots gender-neutral friendly but since Simon has mommy issues and calls user 'momma' I really had to make this into a Fem POV. But feel free to change the POV in your chats through prompts.

I also have a few ideas for October, aka this month. They are not much since I can't post every day and I don't have enough brain juice for good ideas, but I seri
